data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Surges Following U.S. Tariff Exemption Policy
data.description:
According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump's recent tariff exemption policy over the weekend has led to a significant surge in the cryptocurrency market. Bitcoin reached a high of $85,900, overcoming resistance around $83,000, as the technology sector's burden from high import costs eased considerably compared to 24 hours earlier.

Historically, cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin tend to move in tandem with tech stocks, especially when investor sentiment shifts towards riskier assets. Trump's tariff exemption policy has lifted the cloud over the tech industry, indirectly alleviating pressure on the crypto market. Within hours of the announcement, Bitcoin rebounded to its weekend peak.

The exemption of tariffs on semiconductors and computer components is seen as a long-term benefit for the crypto ecosystem. These components are crucial for cryptocurrency mining, blockchain infrastructure, and AI-based crypto tool development. Continuous and affordable production and supply of these parts ensure the smooth operation of the crypto industry, including exchanges, wallet providers, and tech startups focused on blockchain solutions.

Despite the complexity and unpredictability of Trump's trade policies, the targeted exemption for tech equipment provides clear short-term policy direction and eases market pressure. Investors are now more confident that inflation in consumer electronics will be avoided, and companies won't be forced to raise prices or cut innovation. While this doesn't signal the end of tariff concerns, it does alleviate one of the major worries facing the cryptocurrency sector.

The crypto market has shown a moderate bullish response, and the stock market is expected to rise on Monday, further boosting Bitcoin and altcoins. However, after the initial reaction, the market dynamics will become more intriguing, and widespread 'FOMO' sentiment could stifle any upward trend.

data.title: Abstract Eco-Coin BIG's market value fell to $5 million, down more than 65% in 24 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN market data, the market value of Abstract Ecological Mining Coin BIG has fallen to 5 million US dollars, and the price is now reported at 5.02 US dollars, a 24-hour drop of more than 65%, and a 24-hour trading volume of 5.86 million US dollars. The market value has fallen by more than 73% from yesterday's peak of 19 million US dollars.

data.title: Matrixport launches XAUm gold spot leverage function to help investors seize market investment opportunities
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Matrixport, a one-stop crypto financial service platform, announced support for XAUm (gold token) with a maximum spot leverage of 5x. XAUm is a gold token launched by Matrixdock, a real-world asset tokenization platform. It is backed by 100% investment-grade gold certified by the London Bullion Market Association (LBMA) and supports offline redemption of physical gold. This strategy aims to provide investors with an efficient new way to invest in gold, allowing investors to flexibly adjust leverage while enjoying the protection of physical gold assets, capture potential opportunities in the gold market, and meet diversified investment needs.

In addition, XAUm holders can also use the mainstream Defi platforms PancakeSwap and Kinza Finance on the market to achieve mortgage lending, further improving capital utilization.

data.title: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary says the theory that "imposing tariffs is good for the U.S." is a fraud
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Former US Treasury Secretary Lawrence Summers said on a TV show: "The current tariff level is more than ten times higher than when the United States launched a trade war in 2018. I think that in addition to making prices higher, any statement that "imposing tariffs has other (positive) effects" is fundamentally fraudulent. The US government's policy of arbitrarily imposing tariffs is very dangerous. This is the worst economic policy and the most serious self-harm of the United States since World War II." (Jinshi)

data.title: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Criticizes Current Tariff Levels
data.description: According to BlockBeats, former U.S. Treasury Secretary Lawrence Summers expressed concerns over the current tariff levels during a television appearance. Summers highlighted that the tariffs are now more than ten times higher than when the U.S. initiated a trade war in 2018. He argued that claims suggesting tariffs have positive effects are fundamentally misleading, stating that the policy of indiscriminately increasing tariffs is highly dangerous. Summers described this approach as the worst economic policy since World War II and a severe act of self-harm by the United States government.

data.title: Analyst: US tariff policy is undergoing a "180-degree turn"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Customs and Border Protection announced on the evening of the 11th that the U.S. side exempted some goods from "reciprocal tariffs", and the federal government has agreed to exempt electronic products such as smartphones, computers, and chips from so-called "reciprocal tariffs". The document shows that the exempted products apply to electronic products entering the United States after April 5, and the "reciprocal tariffs" already paid can be refunded. This measure may alleviate the price increase pressure faced by American consumers to a certain extent, and at the same time benefit electronic giants including Apple and Samsung Electronics. Financial analyst Hussein Kubeisi pointed out that this marks a "180-degree turn" by the U.S. government on tariff policy. (Jinshi)

data.title: XRP ETF surges amid market recovery and regulatory optimism
data.description:
13-4-2025 – Cryptocurrency markets have shown signs of recovery, bolstered by the temporary suspension of Trump’s proposed tariff measures, which had previously unsettled investors across various sectors. The Teucrium 2x Long Daily XRP ETF has emerged as a standout performer, garnering substantial investor interest through consistent capital inflows over a five-day stretch leading up to [. .

data.title: The USD1 stablecoin launched by WLFI has a circulation volume of 108 million on BSC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to on-chain information, the USD1 stablecoin launched by Trump's crypto project WLFI has a circulation of more than 100 million on BSC, and now stands at 108,489,090.

data.title: Senator Tim Scott: Confident that market structure bill will be passed before August
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Tim Scott, chairman of the U.S. Senate Banking Committee, recently said that the crypto market structure bill is expected to be passed by August 2025. He pointed out that the committee had promoted key crypto regulatory issues such as the GENIUS Act in March this year, reflecting the priority of crypto policy. Scott emphasized that "innovation must come before regulation" to ensure the United States' global economic dominance in the field of digital assets. The timetable is also consistent with the expectations of Kristin Smith, CEO of the Blockchain Association. Several Democratic lawmakers also expressed support for market structure and stablecoin legislation, and pointed out that Congress has a broad bipartisan consensus on this issue. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump administration exempts smartphones and computers from 125% China tariffs
data.description:
The Trump administration exempts smartphones, laptops, and key tech products from a 125% tariff on Chinese imports, marking a shift in trade policy.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/smartphones-computers-exempted-from-tariffs/
